ChangeRequest.name: [Asset Sec] Reserve account as Cash given
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview Originator manages operational risk with an instrument cash given.
### Contact person
### Background information Reserve account is related to account of any bank (not just reporting agent). This is an instrument from originator to SPV with some role. For originator it is _cash given_, to manage operational risk, and SPV controls it.
### Points/Questions to resolve Do we need to report cash given?
### Related issues
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
